data.title: Stewart Information Services Corporation Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
data.description: In Houston, Stewart Information Services Corporation (NYSE: STC) disclosed plans for a conference call discussing their first quarter 2026 earnings. The call is scheduled for 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on Thursday, April 23, 2026, following the earnings release on Wednesday, April 22. To join, individuals can dial (800) 274-8461 (USA) or (203) 518-9814 (International) with the access code STCQ126. Additionally, a replay of the conference call will be accessible afterwards.

data.title: Spyre Therapeutics Announces Proposed Public Offering of its Common Stock
data.description: WALTHAM, Mass., April 13, 2026 - Spyre Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: SYRE), a biotech company focusing on antibody engineering for immune diseases, has announced a $300.0 million public offering of its common stock. The underwriters may also purchase an additional $45.0 million of shares within 30 days. All shares in the offering will come from Spyre.

data.title: Sudden shift: CEO of StarkWare discloses layoffs amidst revenue-focused strategy; headcount reduced to boost income.
data.description: The co-founder and CEO of StarkWare, Eli Ben-Sasson, revealed that the company, which operates on the Ethereum platform, has reduced its staff numbers as part of a strategy to focus on boosting revenue.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- The Jackson Laboratory/
data.description: The Jackson Laboratory has recently bolstered its executive team with the appointment of Steven Holstein as the senior vice president of external affairs. This update was announced on April 13, 2026, through a news release via PR Newswire. The organization has implemented significant changes to enhance its leadership structure.

data.title: Wilentz Secures Appellate Win Affirming $18 Million Commercial Foreclosure Judgment
data.description: In Woodbridge, New Jersey on April 13, 2026, Wilentz, Goldman & Spitzer, P.A. shared news of a major win in the Superior Court of New Jersey's Appellate Division. The court upheld a foreclosure judgment from the Chancery Division totaling over $18 million. This victory marks a significant accomplishment for the firm in successfully defending their client's interests.

data.title: Valvoline Inc. Volunteers to Plant Trees and Support Habitat for Humanity Homes in Lexington, Kentucky for Earth Day
data.description: Valvoline Inc. (NYSE: VVV), a prominent provider of automotive maintenance services, is observing Earth Day by organizing a community service event in Lexington, Ky. Through this initiative, volunteers from Valvoline Inc. will be engaging in activities such as tree planting and sod laying at Habitat for Humanity properties nearing completion. The collaboration with Trees Lexington and Habitat for Humanity of Lexington underscores the company's commitment to environmental conservation and community welfare. This event, held in honor of Earth Day, exemplifies Valvoline's dedication to sustainability and community engagement.

data.title: ImmuCell Bolsters its Innovation Strategy with Appointments of Dr. Gilles Guillemette and Dr. Anthony DiMarco to the Board, and Moves to a Smaller Board of Independent Directors
data.description: ImmuCell Corporation, a company listed on Nasdaq as ICCC, focusing on animal health biologics for calf health and productivity, recently appointed Dr. Gilles Guillemette and Dr. Anthony DiMarco to its Board of Directors as of April 15, 2026. This move increases the Board to 7 members, comprising 6 Independent Directors and the CEO. Additionally, the Company revealed plans to establish a Strategy and Technology Committee within the Board of Directors.

data.title: Cushman & Wakefield to Release First Quarter 2026 Earnings on May 7
data.description: Commercial real estate company Cushman & Wakefield (NYSE: CWK) is set to unveil its first quarter financial figures for 2026 on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at around 7:00 a.m. ET. A conference call will be conducted by the management team at 9:00 a.m. ET on the same day to delve into the numbers. To join the call, dial 1-877-407-0784 for domestic participants or 1-201-689-8560 for international participants, or access the link provided (active 15 minutes before the call).

data.title: Thoma Bravo Announces Agreement to Combine HCSS with the Nemetschek Group's Build & Construct Segment and Create Next Global Construction Technology Leader
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Thoma Bravo, the leading software-focused investment firm globally, revealed a definitive deal to merge HCSS, among the largest heavy civil construction software firms globally, with the Build & Construct.

data.title: CMMI Institute Announces Inaugural Capability Creates 2026 Conference, Bringing Partners and Industry Leaders Together in Washington, D.C.
data.description: A conference titled Capability Creates 2026 will take place in Washington, D.C. from June 23-24, 2026. Professionals from various industries will gather to enhance performance, quality, and implement AI effectively. The event organized by CMMI Institute aims to offer insights on CMMI updates, new initiatives, government actions, alignment with CMMC, and networking opportunities.

data.title: PSEG To Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results On May 5
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated (PSEG) announced that it will conduct its first quarter 2026 earnings call on Tuesday, May 5 at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time (ET). During the call, the management team will provide insights on the company's financial performance for the first quarter, as well as discuss financial guidance, capital allocation, and other important matters. This call is a key event for investors and analysts to gain a better understanding of PSEG's financial status and future strategies.

data.title: ANGEL ANNOUNCES FIVE THEATRICAL RELEASES AND NEW TRAILERS AT COMPANY'S MAINSTAGE PRESENTATION AT CINEMACON
data.description: The new slate of upcoming movies includes Runner, featuring Owen Wilson and Alan Ritchson; The Brink of War, starring Jeff Daniels, Jared Harris, and J.K. Simmons; Angel and the Badman, which stars Tommy Lee Jones and Zachary Levi; Hershey, featuring Finn Wittrock and Alexandra Daddario; and the debut of Drummer Boy Studio.
